---
applyTo: "docs/**/*.md,*.md,.github/**/*.md"
---

# Documentation

Follow `AGENTS.md`; this file adds documentation rules.

- Use sentence-case headings and ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` dates.
- Point to canonical architecture, schema, issue, and project sources instead of copying
  mutable facts into several files.
- Keep `docs/plans/roadmap.md` strategic; live task state belongs in GitHub Project 2.
- Files under `docs/archive/` are read-only historical records.
- Distinguish current behavior, verified evidence, proposals, and unresolved work.
- Do not fabricate precision, rationale, completion, or command results.
- Update runbooks when operational behavior changes.
- Append replan history rather than rewriting previous decisions.
